name: obsidian-tech-app
description: Obsidian Tech - AI-Integrated Mobile Store (Full Stack)

scripts.install: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/dist && rm -rf backend/node_modules && rm -rf frontend/node_modules

author: NEEL LUVANI
